characters.name: Former Characters - Regular
characters.description: Consultant Cardiothoracic Surgeon, Clinical Chairman Ambiguously Jewish: In "You Can Choose Your Friends" He helps Victoria to console a Jewish patient after she receives a treif heart valve made from pig tissue, revealing that his father was Jewish while his mother was Christian (so not technically Jewish himself as he doesn't have a matrilineal link). He quotes from the Torah to encourage the patient to accept her situation, but never shows any signs of holding any sort of belief himself. Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: Meyer prides himself on his emotional detachment and excels at his job as a result, while his sister is shown to be much more openly tender-hearted and this leaves her vulnerable to exploitation by her husband. Hidden Heart of Gold: After he and Nick perform a caesarian on a plane while on a flight back from a conference, he doesn't accept the free flights and hotel in Paris offered as compensation. Instead, he sends the airline a bill for his services, which they initially balk at but do eventually cough up when Meyer gets his solicitors involved. He ends up donating the fee to charity, explaining to Nick that he wanted to make a point about the airline stocking planes with medical equipment without hiring people who are actually qualified to use it in an emergency, and warns Nick not to tell anyone about the donation.On another occasion, he intercedes on Jazz's behalf when the hospital trust offer her an extremely paltry ex-gratia payment as compensation for being stabbed on the job, getting her a much more substantial payout, but denies he ever did anything when she thanks him for it.
